mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMUNITY_HASHTAG ( TAG_NAME, USE_COUNT, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{tagName}, 1, NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} )
INSERT INTO COMMUNITY_POST_HASHTAG ( POST_ID, HASHTAG_ID, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{hashtagId}, NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT h.TAG_NAME as tagName FROM COMMUNITY_POST_HASHTAG ph JOIN COMMUNITY_HASHTAG h ON ph.HASHTAG_ID = h.HASHTAG_ID WHERE ph.POST_ID = #{postId} ORDER BY ph.CREATED_AT ASC
